headline: Half-Life 2 Runs Directly Within Your Web Browser
lede: Valve’s classic first-person shooter has been successfully ported to the web via modern browser technologies. This experiment tests the performance limits of WebAssembly and signals a shift toward native-quality gaming experiences in the browser.

headline: Dolphin Emulator Milestone: Release 2606 Delivers Rare Arcade Support
lede: The latest Dolphin update fixes long-standing visual artifacts and introduces support for rare arcade hardware. These technical refinements allow for modern, high-resolution playback of legacy gaming content.

headline: Anthropic Alleges Massive Data Distillation by Alibaba
lede: Leaked correspondence reveals an industrial-scale effort to mirror the capabilities of frontier AI models. Over 28 million exchanges indicate a sophisticated attempt to harvest proprietary reasoning traces for competitor systems.

headline: OpenAI Unveils Custom Jalapeño Inference Processor
lede: In collaboration with Broadcom, OpenAI has designed its first dedicated inference chip to streamline performance and reduce dependency on third-party GPUs. This custom silicon marks a strategic pivot toward full-stack hardware optimization for AI services.

headline: Cloudflare Extends Self-Managed OAuth to All Customers
lede: Infrastructure-wide OAuth is now available for developers, replacing static API tokens with secure, delegated access flows. The underlying Hydra engine upgrade ensures consistent uptime during this expanded deployment.

headline: Bohemia Interactive Releases Cold War Assault Source Code
lede: The original engine for the seminal Cold War Assault is now open to the public on GitHub. By releasing this C++20 codebase, the developers enable a new generation to study and maintain a foundational piece of tactical gaming history.

headline: LuaJIT 3.0 Proposal Seeks To Modernize Syntax Extensions
lede: The maintainers of LuaJIT have formalized a roadmap to adopt mainstream syntactic conventions while preserving core stability. This governance shift aims to reduce ecosystem fragmentation for future releases.

headline: The Overlooked Value of Stating the Obvious Online
lede: Jim Nielsen argues that blogging is best served by articulating the common frustrations shared by the community rather than chasing elusive novelty. Validating these experiences remains a cornerstone of meaningful digital discourse.
pullquote: Writers should feel empowered to state the obvious rather than constantly striving for novelty.

headline: Markdy Transforms Code Into Motion Graphics Sequences
lede: Markdy functions as a domain-specific language for developers to animate canvas elements using simple configuration files. It brings the efficiency of diagrams-as-code to the world of dynamic motion.

headline: Wikimedia Foundation Staff Seek Landmark Union Recognition
lede: For the first time, employees at the Wikimedia Foundation are pursuing formal collective bargaining rights. This attempt to secure institutional transparency is challenging the traditional labor model of the global non-profit.
